summary: Invitation-bound explicit admission, credential-only resume, durable causal results, membership barriers, exact cancellation, serialized close handling, split rate budgets, and persisted terminal notification pass pure, local, Durable Object, and real-browser oracles.

verification.result: PASS: engine 11/11 with 200 assertions and relay 37/37 with 258 assertions, including explicit admission preservation, exact durable order cancellation, resume, barriers, terminal UX, close queuing, and ACK ordering.
PASS: 31/31 runtime tests with 630 assertions, including raw/operation/room budget separation and post-persistence exact-member terminal delivery in both runtimes.

verification.command: env PILLOWFORT_COMPARE_SNAPSHOTS=0 bun test --timeout 120000 --max-concurrency 1 -t 'banter flows' test/game-night.test.ts
verification.result: PASS: a four-member browser room completed three admissions and nine rapid application events with no rate-limit error or socket close.
verification.replay: env PILLOWFORT_COMPARE_SNAPSHOTS=0 bun test --timeout 120000 --max-concurrency 1 -t 'banter flows' test/game-night.test.ts

proofObjects.environment: pure reducer, local relay, Durable Object harness, and Chromium
